mapper.sql: select apply_id, supplier_id, user_id, status, apply_time, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, create_time from scm_supplier_user_apply

select a.apply_id, a.supplier_id, a.user_id, a.status, a.apply_time, a.audit_by, a.audit_time, a.audit_remark, a.create_time, u.user_name as user_name, u.login_name as login_name from scm_supplier_user_apply a left join sys_user u on a.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.select: where a.supplier_id = #{supplierId} and a.user_id = #{userId} and a.status = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into scm_supplier_user_apply (supplier_id, user_id, status, apply_time, create_time) values (#{supplierId}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{applyTime}, now())
